data.content:
Stale grooming handoff

Beat was groomed because it was stale.
Decision: drop
Rationale: The feature is fully implemented. All four acceptance criteria are satisfied: (1) /api/beats/stale-grooming/options fetches registered agents and the dialog enforces selection before enqueueing; (2) model override is supported via the dispatch helper and review request payload; (3) stale-beat-grooming-dialog-list.tsx renders status and results inline per beat; (4) the job runner and store track state without touching beat workflow states, and the status endpoint supports polling. Six components, four API routes, thirteen library modules, nine unit/route tests, and two Storybook stories are all in place. Nothing in the acceptance criteria remains unbuilt.
Agent: claude-claude-sonnet-4-6
Job: stale-grooming-2
Repo: /home/cartine/foolery
Action: marked abandoned.
